name: document_id_present
expression: document_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(document_id)) > 0
description: Every extracted record must carry a document_id — system invariant required for lineage tracking, audit trail, and deduplication

name: avg_confidence_acceptable
description: Overall extraction confidence below 0.70 indicates the document is likely illegible, heavily redacted, or in an unsupported format; route to quarantine for human review

name: agreement_type_valid_enum
description: Agreement type must be a recognized enumeration; invalid values break downstream routing to the correct contract management workflow

name: effective_date_not_null
description: Effective date is essential for contract lifecycle management, renewal monitoring, and obligation tracking; records without it cannot be reliably managed

name: governing_law_present
expression: governing_law IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(governing_law)) > 0
description: Governing law determines which jurisdiction's rules apply to dispute resolution and enforcement; absence triggers legal review

name: expiration_date_logical
expression: expiration_date IS NULL OR effective_date IS NULL OR expiration_date > effective_date
description: Expiration date must be after effective date if both are present; inversion indicates a date extraction error

name: renewal_notice_days_positive
description: Renewal notice period must be a positive integer if present; zero or negative values indicate an extraction or data entry error
